‚Ä¢ WaSender 3.7.0 & WaCRM 3.3.0 (Official Versions): Fixed an issue affecting some users where group member extraction was not working properly or returning incomplete results in certain cases.
‚Ä¢ Fixed a messaging issue where some recipients were being skipped when sending standard messages, Quick Replies, or Auto Reply messages, ensuring that all selected contacts now receive messages without exception.
‚Ä¢ Improved the number extraction mechanism from groups, chats, and Labels, resolving cases where incorrect or unusual IDs were returned. The system now accurately retrieves real phone numbers.
‚Ä¢ Enhanced overall sending stability and ensured accurate targeting of the correct phone number for each message, with improved reliability during campaigns and bulk sending.
‚Ä¢ (Note: This update is intended for the official versions WaSender 3.7.0 and WaCRM 3.3.0. Users running modified or unofficial versions may experience issues.)
